# Beat Saber Custom Songs Catalog

*Auto-generated from BSSB Top 100 most-played custom levels (Jan 2021-present), BeatSaver, and BeatSaber community sources.*

*Note: This catalog represents songs available on BeatSaver.com. The download links below are direct BeatSaver pages. Full zip downloads are available on BeatSaver for each map. For a complete catalog of all available songs, visit https://beatsaver.com.*

## Sources

- **BeatSaver**: https://beatsaver.com — Primary repository, hosts 100,000+ custom maps
- **BSSB Top 100**: https://bssb.app/stats/top/custom-levels — Most-played in multiplayer (Jan 2021-present)
- **BeastSaber Curated**: https://bsaber.com — Community-curated featured maps
- **ScoreSaber Ranked**: https://scoresaber.com — Ranked competitive maps

## Notes

- BeatSaver hosts **over 100,000 custom maps** across all versions (v1-v4 formats)
- Maps requiring mods (Chroma, Noodle Extensions, Cinema) may not be compatible with all game versions
- PS4 conversion priority should focus on maps using **Standard mode** with no mod requirements (to ensure broadest compatibility)
- Maps are downloaded as `.zip` files containing `info.dat`, difficulty `.dat` files, cover image, and audio

## Recommended Priority Maps for PS4 Conversion

Based on high play counts and broad appeal (no mod requirements):
